summary:
WEATHER AND SPIRITUAL AUTHORITY: Brandon recounts a severe storm system with tornadoes passing through Oklahoma in early March, resulting in fatalities. He highlights a testimony from a woman who used her spiritual authority from within a storm shelter to protect her home as a massive, freight-train-sounding tornado passed directly overhead, emphasizing the divine power believers have over natural elements.

VISION OF BODILY RESURRECTION: Brandon details a profound spiritual vision involving the total restoration of a decayed skeleton belonging to a Middle Eastern man. He describes a whirlwind enveloping the bones, miraculously reconstructing tendons, organs, flesh, and skin, drawing a direct parallel to the biblical prophecy of Ezekiel. Brandon explains that God intends to literally raise the dead as an unprecedented shock-and-awe sign to convert unbelievers in the last days.

GEOPOLITICAL ASSASSINATIONS AND MIDDLE EAST CONFLICT: Brandon shares prophetic warnings concerning international instability, specifically a vision of an Iranian transitional leader being assassinated on stage, which quickly paved the way for a harsh regime similar to the Ayatollah. He also recounts a vivid warning about a revenge plot by Iranian forces seeking retaliation for the death of Qasem Soleimani, targeting Don Jr. and Eric Trump. This includes a stark vision of an assassination, a grieving Donald Trump and Melania at a funeral, and an escalating conflict involving Israel bombing Iranian infrastructure, potentially destroying oil wells and massively impacting the global petro-dollar.

SEISMIC WARNINGS AND MARINE ANOMALIES: Brandon connects the unusual phenomenon of deep-sea oarfish washing ashore in places like Vietnam and the American West Coast to impending geological disasters. He warns that these events signal massive underwater volcanic eruptions and catastrophic earthquakes along the Ring of Fire, specifically predicting a devastating earthquake that will split Japan and a major volcanic eruption near the Oregon coastline that will trigger a massive tsunami.

FINANCIAL WEALTH TRANSFER: Brandon predicts a massive financial outpouring intended to fund the end-time harvest, emphasizing investments in cryptocurrencies, precious metals, and real estate. He notes that legislative movements like the Clarity Act and the breaking of institutional banking constraints will release a financial wave that empowers trusted believers to fund global ministry efforts.

RADICAL INCLUSION IN THE END TIME HARVEST: Brandon emphasizes a divine instruction to display immense patience and love toward new converts, describing a coming wave of radically diverse believers. He foresees marginalized individuals, including transgender people and homosexuals, as well as entrenched devil worshipers and satanic high priestesses, entering the church seeking salvation. Brandon urges believers to abandon judgmental attitudes and rely on the Holy Spirit to disciple and deliver these individuals from the darkest backgrounds.
rawData: [March 07, 2026]-[What The Lord told me about the Dead being raised]-[https://youtu.be/bHVnPIa0Cn4]-[Well, when you come in, please tell us where you're from so we know where the viewers are tonight. But we took our authority and they passed. They were not too far from us. You could see them go by. Isn't Jesus wonderful that we have power and authority over storms? Because I knew it went over this lady's house. I asked, "Can you hear it?" She said, "Yes. It sounds like trains. It's so loud, even from where we were, you could hear the clouds turning. They make such a loud noise. What's amazing is you know when you have wind gusts and straight line winds, it's just blowing at surface level. But whenever you hear a tornado turning up in the clouds and it's getting ready to come down, you can hear it up there. It sounds like a freight train. It's so powerful. And so, it's pretty amazing weather. As I've been praying over it, the Lord warned me. He said, "Braden, I told you it'd be a very active season. This has already started. We're just in the first part of March and we're already having two fatalities in Oklahoma, and that's too much." All right. Well, let's get started. Good evening, family. Thank you for joining us again. We're excited to be here. Braden is here, and like I said, we've been praying most of the night for these storms. Braden has some clips for you. He's trying to expand his tent for the revival. The Lord told us he wants to record the miracles for what's about to happen to give an account with good video quality. You know, I know we could use our iPhone, but the Lord said, "I want excellence. Let's do this big." I said, "Yeah, when somebody's legs are going to grow out, let's get good video coverage and put it all over the internet. I know that God is going to use us for this end-time revival." And Braden, I truly believe with all my heart, son, the Lord, we're going to record these miracles. We're going to record the signs of the fog coming in the room and people go, "Is that AI?" No, you're going to feel the glory through the camera lens. You can't fake the glory. If you're watching something and the glory is not really there, you know it's AI. But when you know the presence of the Lord is truly there and it comes through the camera lens, kind of like when you watch a healing service like Billy Burke, you can feel it. I'm just anticipating being able to, with Braden increasing his knowledge on computer editing, trying really hard. He's doing really good, but I have an urgency. I told him, "What does this 2026 look like? Are we ready? Are we prepared for what's about to happen? Is the church ready? Does the church have good equipment?" It's important because we're going to show the world that God is still the I Am. I Am that I Am. Last night, that was probably the coolest vision I've had in a long time, y'all. I'll be real with you. When I saw that, at first I saw the skeleton, and the skeleton was being held up by the spinal column, and you could see the ribs, but I couldn't see the bottom half of the body. All I could see as I was praying into this was a skeleton, and it looked like it was coming alive. When I saw the whirlwind around it, I thought it was demonic. I thought, I'm seeing something evil right now. All of a sudden, I was able to take a step back from the vision and see the whirlwind that looked like a tornado turning around this skeleton system. As I was watching this in the spirit, I could see the flesh, bone, muscle, tendons, and tissue all coming back into this. It started from the toes and went up through the calf, to the knees, to the waist, to the stomach. When it got right here, I could see the heart starting to get ready to pump and the flesh was coming back. The lungs were being restored. The skin and the hair went all the way back up. And I saw the skeleton's mouth open. All of a sudden, that whirlwind went inside of that mouth like you swallow it. Life, hair, everything. He looked Middle Eastern. The Lord said, "How dead is dead? Dead is dead." But having a decayed body get up right in front of your face when it was just a skeleton system—it's already deteriorated, it's already been gone for a year or six months—I don't know. How long does it take for your body to deteriorate like that in a coffin? Pretty gross. Or in the dirt, their skeletons or whatever. I don't know. Maybe a wood coffin. I don't know what that would look like. I've never seen somebody decay like that. But the bones looked yellow from where the blood was, from the body where the body had life at one time. They were stained. They didn't look white like white bones. They looked like bones that had been stained. Human goo, you know? As I saw it come back to life, the hollowed-out eyes came back in. The Lord kept saying, "How dead is dead?" I said, "Those that were dead, yet shall he live." Then he gave me the scripture from Ezekiel. He said, "Brandon, I've done it once, I'll do it again.
